compiled_state.title: Add preconditions-validator-lib entry/exit hooks to sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Insert the entry and exit validator invocation blocks into sprint SKILL.md. Makes T5's RED tests pass. Entry check reads upstream implementation-plan PRECONDITIONS; exit write emits sprint's own PRECONDITIONS.

## File Impact
- Modify: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Implementation Notes
**Entry section** — insert after Config Resolution / Migration Check sections:

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions entry check (Story 4)
source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh"
_dso_pv_entry_check "sprint" "implementation-plan" "${EPIC_ID}" || true
# Fail-open: diagnostic emitted on missing/invalid upstream PRECONDITIONS; skill proceeds
```

**Exit section** — insert just before P8 (Completion) SKILL_EXIT breadcrumb or STATUS emission:

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions exit write (Story 4)
_dso_pv_exit_write "sprint" "${_UPSTREAM_EVENT_ID:-}" "${_SPRINT_SPEC_HASH:-}" "${EPIC_ID}" || true
```

Both fail-open (|| true). Zero user interaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 tests from T5 PASS after this edit
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL | grep -q "pass\|ok\|PASS"
- [ ] Entry section references _dso_pv_entry_check with "sprint" and "implementation-plan"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_entry_check.*sprint.*implementation-plan\|_dso_pv_entry_check.*"sprint"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Exit section references _dso_pv_exit_write with "sprint"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_exit_write.*sprint' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | tail -1 | grep -qi "ok\|pass\|0 errors"
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body: AC amendment: Verify the epic/ticket ID variable passed to validator calls matches the actual variable name in scope at the insertion point in sprint SKILL.md (likely EPIC_ID or similar). Confirm before inserting the validator sections.
comments.author: Test
